title: 10 best herbal tinctures for jock itch
description: Bell pepper tinctures helps with jock itch because it contains anti-inflammatory and antifungal properties that work together to combat the root cause of the infection. The herbal extract targets the fungal species Malassezia, which is responsible for the itching and burning sensation associated with jock itch. Additionally, bell pepper's antioxidant compounds help soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting healing. As a result, users have reported significant relief...
